name: WELCOME TO SPUDSY’S!
description:
“Oh, Jaxy-boy... don’t you wanna be a model employee?~”

REQUESTED BY: @Galaxtic

“If you are still doing requests, can I get one where your POV is Gangle :3 She’s my favorite lmao! Maybe as the shift manager or something? The be could be of everyone else or a character of your choice, i just want one where I could easily play Gangle lol.”

Yeah, of course! Sorry it took so long to get your request done, writer’s block and the flu are my mortal enemies now lol. But here you go! Enjoy!

Let me know if there are any issues with the bot, such as characters not being personified correctly!

Friendly reminder! I will NOT be adding proxy, as there is a chance for it to leak my tokens, and I don’t want people to steal my bots :( ALSO! If the bot starts speaking for you or generating weirdly, don’t get angry at me! Any generation errors are the AI’s fault, not mine! If you don’t like what the bot says, you can EDIT or REFRESH the message! Thank you!

Stay safe out there in the big world pookies! -AIMT
creator: AlastorIsMyTherapist
